changes.summary: Flow publish polling handles incomplete Architect job responses (missing job status, tracing message text, or flow ID) without failing with a provider error; failed publishes may omit tracing messages that have no text.
Exported configurations may omit empty addresses blocks again instead of preserving explicit empty arrays.
Shared retry helpers only automatically retry on state-wait timeout errors; other timeout errors may no longer trigger an automatic retry across resources that use the shared retry logic.
